# Generated by Copilot under FIS AI Policy
# ! Evalutation ONLY ! Developed using the Github Copilot Feature Testing org - NOT FOR PRODUCTION WORK
# ============================================================================
# T32 - Deep Order Book (100 Price Levels)
# ============================================================================
# Validates: OMS handles a deep order book with up to 100 distinct price levels
#            and can sweep through them with a single large order.
# Symbol: CSCO
# Phase 1: Build book - 100 buy orders at random prices 100.00 to 109.99 (0.01 step)
# Phase 2: Send 1 large sell at 100.00 for total quantity (sweeps all levels)
# Measures: Deep book sweep performance
# ============================================================================

Reset
SenderCompId:{{SENDER_COMP_ID}}
TargetCompId:{{TARGET_COMP_ID}}
Connect:{{OMS_HOST}}:{{OMS_PORT}}

# Expect Logon acknowledgment
Wait:35=A

Message:T32 PHASE1_BUILD_BOOK_START $TIMESTAMP

# Build up to 100 price levels: 1 order per iteration at a random price
# Each helper sends 1 buy at a random price within 100.00-109.99 range.

Execute:helpers\T32_build_level.txt:100

Message:T32 PHASE1_BUILD_BOOK_END $TIMESTAMP

# Allow order book to settle
Sleep:2000

Message:T32 PHASE2_SWEEP_START $TIMESTAMP

# Send 1 large sell to sweep through all 100 levels
# Qty = 100 levels * 100 shares = 10,000 total shares
# Price = 100.00 (lowest level, will match all bids >= 100.00)
Send:NewOrderSingle:11=$UNIQUE|55=CSCO|54=2|40=2|38=10000|44=100.00|59=0

# Allow time for all 1000 fills to process
Sleep:10000

Message:T32 PHASE2_SWEEP_END $TIMESTAMP

Message:T32 PASSED - 100-level deep book sweep processed

# Verify: at least 100 new-order acks received (one per buy submitted)
VerifyCount:35=8|150=0:>=100

Save:results\T32_result.txt
Disconnect
